overview: Live Now Recovery is a privacy-first, real-time recovery and resource platform for Medication-Assisted Treatment, harm reduction, and long-term support — built on the Internet Computer Protocol. Now featuring a private investor pitch page showcasing the platform's infrastructure, Sentinel prediction engine, and community impact.
features: Private investor pitch page at /pitch with seven immersive sections
Live stat counters pulling from canister (providers, handoffs, volunteers)
Sentinel prediction engine showcased with 7-signal risk stack
Contact form sending directly to admin@livenowrecovery.org
Premium editorial design with serif headlines and grain texture
Soul-bound on-chain credentials and volunteer credentialing system
Real-time Citizens Hub with live canister data
Admin dashboard with live provider and volunteer management
